name: defense_and_telecommunications_model_based_mesa_tru_loy
premise: A Defense and Telecommunications response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving defense and telecommunications model based mesa tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Elena Okoye
agents.identity: I am Elena Okoye, accountable for a defensible call in Defense and Telecommunications when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Ravi Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Ravi Ishikawa, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Defense and Telecommunications.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Elena Okoye must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Elena Okoye do?
